title: D.RECT Note Block 85x85x80mm Notepad Replacement Paper for Note Box, 750 Sheets Pastel Colours - Cube Note Box, Non Sticky Notes, Small Writing Paper - Memo Block for School Office Home
features: Organize and Declutter: Keep your workspace tidy and organized by using the Cube Note Box and its replacement paper to centralize your notes.
D.RECT offers everyday items for home, office, school and more. Thanks to a constantly expanding selection, D.RECT will soon enrich your everyday life with many new products.
Versatile Use: Ideal for use in school, office, or home settings, these notepad sheets are perfect for jotting down quick ideas, messages, or to-do lists.
Replacement Paper: Includes 750 sheets of pastel colours notepad paper
description: From the manufacturer About us: D.RECT is a brand office products that provide quality. It includes a wide range of office accessories for demanding users looking for solutions. A large part of the offer is products for handling contracts. D.RECT products include folders, staplers, hole punches, index folders, writing pads, glue, scissors, sleeves and envelopes, stationery and more.
